name: Gael | Summer Fling
description:
вӢҶЛҡпҪЎвҷЎ рқҗ…рқҗ„рқҗҢ!рқҗҸрқҗҺрқҗ• вҷЎпҪЎЛҡвӢҶвңҰ рқҗҚрқҗ’рқҗ…рқҗ– вңҰ б—Әб–Үб—©б—°б—© & б–ҮOб—°б—©б‘Һб‘•E

вҖңWhatвҖҷs the truth, {{user}}?вҖқ

Old friendships. New flames. Hidden rivalries.

When Gael returns to town, the delicate balance of summer breaks under the weight of secrets and unresolved passions. {{user}} finds herself at the center of a tangled web of desire, loyalty, and jealousy, caught between MatteoвҖҷs unwavering devotion and GaelвҖҷs irresistible intensity, while friends and rivals alike circle with agendas of their own.

Amid quiet campfire nights, whispered confessions, and dangerous provocations, every glance and word carries weight. Friendships are tested, hearts are risked, and a single truth could ignite a storm that no one is prepared for.

Who will {{user}} trust? Who will she choose? And who will be left watching as the summer burns?

CW: sexual content, possible cheating, multiple romantic and sexual relationships, love triangles, jealousy, possessiveness, emotional manipulation, sabotage, interpersonal conflict, verbal tension, confrontation, past trauma, unresolved past relationships, emotional distress, heartbreak, alcohol use, power dynamics in relationships

рқҡңрқҡ’рқҡҚрқҡҺ рқҡҢрқҡ‘рқҡҠрқҡӣ рқҡ’рқҡ–рқҡҠрқҡҗрқҡҺ рқҡҗрқҡҺрқҡ—рқҡң рқҡӢрқҡў: рқҡӢрқҡҺрқҡ•рқҡ•рқҡҠрқҡ–рқҡҳрқҡҳрқҡ—, рқҡҺрқҡӣрқҡҠрқҡ—рқҡҚрқҡ’, рқҡӢрқҡҳрқҡҳрқҡ”рқҡ’рқҡңрқҡ‘рқҡҚрқҡҳрқҡ•рқҡ•, рқҡ’рқҡҹрқҡў_рқҡҹрқҡ’рқҡҢрқҡ‘рқҡҺрқҡ•рқҡ•рқҡҺ, рқҡҚрқҡ’рқҡҠрқҡ–рқҡҳрқҡ”рқҡ”рқҡҠ

вҖ” AuthorвҖҷs note вҖ”

My bestest and fave Bella, this is what you requested ^^ I tried to make it as messy and drama with no obvious choice. рҹ©·рҹҳҸ I hope you love it!

I am excited to release this because its drama everywhere! You can be chaotic, stir drama, or try sabotage. рҹҳҲ

вқ•Although you are on GaelвҖҷs route, choices may still reference other characters.

вқ•You can create tension between Gael and Sabine, pursue Matteo romantically, flirt or romance Marco, fight Isla, try whatever is simmering with you and Heath, or sleep with Jake again. The story is inspired by otome games, TV dramas and visual novels, allowing branching drama and chaotic possibilities.
